title: Crypto
html:
Crypto

Yahir's umbrella concept covering blockchain, ETH, stablecoins, "programmable internet money," DeFi, NFTs, and the broader financial freedom thesis. Spans 2020 → 2025 as a recurring rabbit-hole, anchored by the Corvallis Crypto Club founding chapter and the WagerWrld crypto-as-regulatory-arbitrage reasoning.

Chronology

  • 2020-04-07 — 2020 04 07 what a strange time indeed — earliest vault crypto mention (COVID-era discovery)
  • 2021-01-26 — 2021 01 26 Oregon State Application — crypto on the OSU application as a thing-Yahir-cares-about
  • 2021-04-19 — 2021 04 19 why osu — "why OSU" essay namechecks crypto interest
  • 2021-04-27 — 2021 04 27 crypto internship earning — first attempt at monetizing
  • 2021-04-28 — 2021 04 28 proscons travel vs work — crypto as part of the travel-vs-work decision
  • 2021-01-17 — 2021 01 17 FHS 215 CJ JJ F2020 — finals-week mention
  • 2021-12-05 — 2021 12 05 cameron crypto and drugs thesis — Cam-era crypto thesis
  • 2022-03-08 — 2022 03 08 web3 starter pack — full web3 onboarding pack
  • 2022-12-19 — 2022 12 19 oebvs oregon crypto lead — Oregon-state crypto lead role
  • 2023-01-05 — 2023 01 05 2023 Goals — crypto on the 2023 goals list
  • 2023-01-30 — 2023 01 30 eli internship — crypto-internship orbit
  • 2023-04-12 — 2023 04 12 questions for patrick mooney — diligence questions for a mentor
  • 2024-11-28 — 2024 11 28 PHIB — late-2024 mention
  • 2025-12-10 — 2025 12 10 screenshot 2025 12 10 at 12 46 27 pm 6eaa2e7d — most recent screenshot evidence

Why it matters

Crypto is the continuous undercurrent of Yahir's financial thinking from age 17 onward — never the headline, always present. Three modes recur:

  1. Identity / interest (the OSU application, the 2023 goals)
  2. Monetization vehicle (internship hunts, wagerwrld crypto-rail reasoning, the tokenization of real world assets line)
  3. Regulatory arbitrage (the explicit WagerWrld reasoning: crypto rail dodges state-by-state USD restrictions on peer-wager apps)

The crypto arc never becomes a primary project, but it enables the stealth-apps thinking by giving Yahir a vocabulary for non-traditional payment + trust rails.

Connections

ethereum · financial freedom · corvallis crypto club · cam jipp · wagerwrld · swipr · tokenization of real world assets · no runway discipline · bridge income strategies · osu
